p2p_enrich.notes: Added 5 repo_tests pass_to_pass gates using actual CI commands. Discovered and verified CI commands from .github/workflows/pr.yml and package.json scripts: 1) pnpm nx run @tanstack/router-core:test:types - TypeScript type checking across multiple TS versions (55-60), 2) pnpm nx run @tanstack/router-core:test:unit -- --run - Full unit test suite with vitest (1060 tests passed), 3) pnpm nx run @tanstack/router-core:test:eslint - ESLint code quality checks (passed with warnings only), 4) pnpm nx run @tanstack/router-core:test:build - Build verification with publint and attw, 5) pnpm vitest run tests/hydrate.test.ts - Targeted SSR hydration tests. All 5 new p2p gates pass at base commit. Modified files: tests/test_outputs.py (added 5 new test functions), tests/test.sh (added --break-system-packages flag), eval_manifest.yaml (added 5 new checks with origin: repo_tests).

rubric_enrichment.rejection_reasons: Rejected rules about: pnpm workspace protocol (not applicable to code logic), Nx commands (process not code), testing workflow (not evaluable from diff), PR workflow (process not code)
